property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.memory-mb
property.description: Total physical memory (in MB) on the node available for YARN containers

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.resource.cpu-vcores
property.description: Number of CPU vcores available for YARN containers

property.name: yarn.scheduler.minimum-allocation-mb
property.description: Minimum limit of memory allocation request for each container

property.name: yarn.scheduler.maximum-allocation-mb
property.description: Maximum limit of memory allocation request for each container

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.aux-services
property.description: Auxiliary services to be run by the NodeManager

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.pmem-check-enabled
property.description: Disables physical memory limits check (prevents container killings due to Docker memory leaks)

property.name: yarn.nodemanager.vmem-check-enabled
property.description: Disables virtual memory limits check (prevents premature container killings due to JVM allocating large virtual spaces)

property.name: yarn.log-aggregation-enable
property.description: Enables YARN log aggregation, allowing us to inspect logs using yarn logs -applicationId
